entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop for which submerged soil fertility is being assessed

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY INDEX
entities.description: A measure used to assess the fertility status of wetland soils

entities.name: SUBMERGED SOILS
entities.description: Soils that are flooded or submerged, characteristic of wetlands

entities.name: WETLANDS
entities.description: Areas of land where the soil is saturated with water

entities.name: SOIL SOLUTION ELECTRICAL CONDUCTIVITY
entities.description: A measurement of the electrical conductivity of the soil solution used as a fertility index

entities.name: NUTRIENT ELEMENTS
entities.description: Macro- and micronutrient elements mobilized in the soil solution

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region from which the 15 diverse rice soils were sourced

entities.name: PH
entities.description: The measure of acidity or alkalinity of the soil solution

entities.name: EH
entities.description: The redox potential of the soil solution

entities.name: ORGANIC C
entities.description: Organic carbon present in the soil

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: Iron element extracted from the soil

entities.name: EDTA
entities.description: Ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid used for extracting iron from soil

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: The salt content of the soil which can interfere with the EC-based fertility index
